semantic.role: Defines codebase naming conventions for consistency within a monorepo.
outOfScope: Other coding standards such as formatting or architecture

English.purpose: To establish and enforce naming conventions that ensure consistency across a large monorepo.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for developers working in a TypeScript monorepo who need to adhere to naming standards for interfaces and test files. It is part of the ArchSpine rules system maintained by the development team.
key_takeaways: Interfaces in src/types/**/*.ts must be prefixed with 'I'.
Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts.
Violations are flagged as warnings for interface prefixes and errors for test file suffixes.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 规定代码库中的命名规范，确保在大型单一代码库中保持风格统一。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向在 TypeScript 单一代码库中工作的开发者，他们需要遵循接口和测试文件的命名标准。本文档是 ArchSpine 规则系统的一部分，由开发团队维护。
key_takeaways: src/types/**/*.ts 中的接口必须以 'I' 开头。
测试文件必须以 .test.ts 或 .spec.ts 结尾。
违反接口前缀规范会触发警告，违反测试文件后缀规范会触发错误。
